[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100111 4
1 0111101 5
2 1101011 5
3 0100001 2
4 0010110 3
5 1100100 3
6 1110111 6
7 1110110 5

34 43 1111110 6
